steps.title: Read the parabola direction
steps.content:
The parabola opens upward, so the coefficient of $x^2$ is positive. This keeps the quadratic equation
$$
y=\frac{7}{16}x^2
$$

steps.title: Read the line direction
steps.content: The line rises from left to right, so its slope is positive. This keeps the linear equation $$ y=\frac{7}{4}x $$ The answer is D.
